questions.text: Provide a brief description of your business or organisation, including any commercial relationships with Zoetis and/or Neogen Genomics.
If you purchase any animal genomic testing services from Zoetis or Neogen Genomics, please outline which services you acquire from which party, and the estimated value of services acquired per annum.
If you compete with Zoetis and/or Neogen Genomics, please describe the service(s) you supply that overlap with services supplied by Zoetis and/or Neogen Genomics.

Outline any concerns regarding the competitive impact of the Acquisition on the supply of animal genomic testing services. Are Zoetis and Neogen Genomics close competitors, and what alternatives are available?
Please identify any examples of recent new entry or exit in the supply of animal genomic testing services in Australia.

Please detail any barriers to entering the Australian market for the supply of animal genomic testing services (whether by establishing facilities in Australia, or by supplying into Australia from overseas).
Provide any additional information or comments that you consider relevant to the ACCC’s assessment of the Acquisition.
